title: AepCapabilities
description: Server-driven capability manifest returned by GET /api/v1/capabilities. All consumers (UI, gateways, agents) must derive their feature gates from this canonical schema. Do not add fields here without a matching backend change and a corresponding test.

dataCloud.description: Data Cloud integration is available for this tenant. When false, Data Cloud-dependent pages and actions must be hidden.

redis.description: Redis cache layer is available. Affects session durability and real-time event buffering.

analyticsStore.description: Analytics store (ClickHouse or equivalent) is reachable. Gates cost and monitoring dashboards.

aiSuggestions.description: AI-powered suggestions (NLP triage, confidence hints) are available.

nlpParse.description: NLP parser is available for request triage and pattern matching.

gdprCompliance.description: GDPR fulfilment endpoints are wired. Gates the Privacy Requests page.

soc2Compliance.description: SOC 2 audit log integration is active. Gates compliance-level audit views.

piiEnforcement.description: PII enforcement middleware is active. When false, PII-sensitive fields are not masked.

killSwitch.description: Emergency kill-switch capability is available for tenant administrators.

gracefulDegradation.description: Backend supports graceful degradation; UI degraded-mode banner should respect this flag.

policyEngine.description: Policy engine (HITL approve/reject, pattern policies) is available.

episodeLearning.description: Agent episode learning and memory replay are available.

humanInTheLoop.description: HITL review queue is wired. Gates the HITL Review page.

serverSideConsent.description: Server-side consent propagation is active for privacy-aware data flows.

durableSessions.description: Sessions are persisted across restarts (requires Redis). When false, sessions are in-memory only.

sseStreaming.description: Server-Sent Events endpoint is available for real-time pipeline streaming.
